ddls:
CREATE TABLE "requirements" (
  "req_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each requirement */,
  "req_type" TEXT /* Type of requirement (e.g., SR_Requirement) */,
  "text" TEXT /* Detailed description of the requirement */,
  "state" TEXT /* Current state of the requirement (e.g., REQ_Approved) */,
  "dcr_title" TEXT /* Title associated with the DCR (Document Change Request) */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the requirement */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the requirement was created */,
  "last_modified_by" TEXT /* User who last modified the requirement */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the requirement was last modified */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the requirement (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project to which the requirement belongs */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the requirement */,
  "parent_req_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent requirement (for hierarchical requirements) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("req_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_requirements_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("username"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_requirements_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("username"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_requirements_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_cases" (
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test case */,
  "req_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the requirement being tested */,
  "build_test_method" TEXT /* Method used for testing the requirement */,
  "test_result" TEXT /* Result of the test (e.g., Pass, Fail) */,
  "test_comment" TEXT /* Comments regarding the test result */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the test case */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the test case was created */,
  "last_modified_by" TEXT /* User who last modified the test case */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the test case was last modified */,
  "test_case_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the test case */,
  "test_case_steps" TEXT /* Steps involved in the test case */,
  "test_case_result_details" TEXT /* Detailed results of the test case */,
  "test_environment" TEXT /* Environment in which the test case was executed (e.g., Development, Staging, Production) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_cases_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("username"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_cases_req_id FOREIGN KEY ("req_id") REFERENCES requirements ("req_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_cases_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("username")
)

CREATE TABLE "dcr_history" (
  "dcr_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each DCR entry */,
  "req_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated requirement */,
  "revision_state" TEXT /* State of the revision (e.g., REQ_Revision Approved) */,
  "revision_comment" TEXT /* Comments regarding the DCR revision */,
  "revision_date" TEXT /* Date when the revision was made */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the DCR entry */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the DCR entry was created */,
  "last_modified_by" TEXT /* User who last modified the DCR entry */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the DCR entry was last modified */,
  "dcr_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the DCR */,
  "dcr_type" TEXT /* Type of the DCR (e.g., New Requirement, Requirement Change) */,
  "dcr_status" TEXT /* Status of the DCR (e.g., Open, In Progress, Closed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dcr_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dcr_history_req_id FOREIGN KEY ("req_id") REFERENCES requirements ("req_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dcr_history_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("username"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dcr_history_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("username")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "project_manager" TEXT /* Manager of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Developer, Tester, Manager) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
